query:
UPDATE users SET dataOrigin = 'system' WHERE 
  email LIKE '%test%' OR 
  email LIKE '%example.com%' OR 
  email LIKE '%bulk%' OR 
  email LIKE '%qvs2%' OR 
  name LIKE '%test%' OR 
  name LIKE '%manual%';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute UPDATE users SET dataOrigin = 'system' WHERE

  email LIKE '%qvs2%' OR 
  name LIKE '%test%' OR
